examples: We had the chance to meet the president last week: we have a good/strong chance of making / to make a profit.
There was a fat/slim chance that my letter would arrive in time.
Why leave it to chance when a few simple steps will secure the desired outcome?
My whole life seems to be ruled by blind chance.
There is a 30 percent chance of rain tomorrow.
There is little chance of having the chance to approach such a big celeb.

definitions.text: To happen by chance, to occur.
examples: It chanced that I found a solution the very next day.
Shall we carry the umbrella, or chance a rainstorm?
